professional_summary.title: AI/ML Engineer specializing in Computer Vision and deep learning for autonomous and healthcare systems.
highlights: Experienced in building real-time perception pipelines and full-stack research platforms
Expertise in YOLOv8, SORT, OpenCV, FastAPI, and Python
Published IEEE researcher with hands-on experience in edge AI deployment

responsibilities: Optimized MRI Machine parameters using Reinforcement Learning to reduce Scan time and improve SNR
Engineered an AI-based co-pilot system for autonomous object detection, multi-object tracking, and target lock-on using YOLOv8n and SORT
Fine-tuned YOLOv8n on drone-specific visual data and evaluated detection performance using mAP@50
Integrated the perception pipeline with PyMAVLink telemetry and deployed inference on a companion computer for real-time onboard decision support
Automated and optimized CI/CD and Continuous Testing pipelines using Jenkins and Git, reducing test feedback cycles by 30%
Migrated legacy Tcl-based tooling to Python (PyGTK/PyGObject), improving system observability and reducing MTTR by 50%
Built a real-time flight telemetry prediction API using FastAPI and Python, supporting 100+ mission parameters
Developed a cross-platform Electron.js visualization tool to analyze inference outputs and flight logs, reducing manual analysis time by 40%
Engineered YOLOv8-based computer vision pipelines, achieving ~85% detection accuracy
Implemented vision-based tracking and path planning using OpenCV, ROS, and MAVROS

research.title: Blended Wing UAV for Intelligent Surveillance: Design and Deep Learning-Based Human Detection
accomplishments: Architected a deep learning-enabled UAV system for real-time human detection
Trained an EfficientNetB3-based CNN, achieving 96.3% training accuracy and 94.7% validation accuracy
Validated real-time onboard inference beyond 120 m detection range

projects.subtitle: Medical Imaging Research Platform (Hackathon Project)
projects.description: Healthcare research platform enabling secure collaboration between hospitals, researchers, radiologists, and patients using medical imaging data
accomplishments: Built a full-stack application using Next.js (React) frontend and FastAPI (Python) backend with MongoDB
Integrated Orthanc PACS for DICOM storage and implemented automated DICOM anonymization pipelines
Implemented role-based access control supporting multiple clinical and research user workflows
Built a browser-based DICOM image viewer using Cornerstone.js and WADO protocols
Developed REST APIs for DICOM search, metadata extraction, and image retrieval with robust logging and error handling

projects.description: Autonomous UAV system with deep learning-driven vision-guided payload deployment
accomplishments: Designed an autonomous UAV system with deep learning-driven vision-guided payload deployment using YOLOv8
Achieved ±1.5 m payload drop error by fusing computer vision inference with flight telemetry

projects.subtitle: Ride Sharing Application
accomplishments: Built a backend-driven location-based ride matching system
Reduced average match time by 35% through proximity-based optimization
Built a real-time phishing email detection pipeline using Flask, Snort, and TShark

additional_information.availability: Open to part-time, contract, and remote roles alongside current internship
